actions.text: ### Strategic Context
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Partnership Positioning**: This is a community collaboration event, not a sales pitch. Magic EdTech is distribution partner with aligned ICP (educators, workforce development professionals). Careerspan benefits from access to their established EdTech audience ahead of EdTech Week NYC. Both parties gain thought leadership positioning on "continuous learning replacing traditional career ladders."
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: EdTech Week Timing**: Event scheduled for week after EdTech Week NYC (Oct 21-25), allowing in-person meetups to drive webinar registrations. Magic EdTech team attending EdTech Week events, Vrijen plans to attend (asked for recommendations, Olivia will share schedule). Opportunity for face-to-face relationship building before virtual panel.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Higher Ed Career Services Market Insights**: Lisa revealed critical constraints on career services (non-revenue drivers, underfunded, 50% of students never visit, placement metrics incomplete, MBA programs are exception where outcomes = rankings = funding). This validates Careerspan's B2C strategy and explains why direct-to-student AI tools can scale where centralized services cannot. Lisa explicitly endorsed Careerspan: "Thank God for you. People don't have to rely on my Harry Potter sorting hat tools that are all in my head."
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Content Depth Expectation**: Conversation organically generated webinar-quality discourse during planning call (hot takes on career tech, self-representation challenges, AI's role in autonomy, systemic barriers to talent identification). Panelists are well-aligned and don't need extensive prep—Olivia's topic guide primed the discussion effectively.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window
